title: Open WebUI
oneLiner: A self-hosted AI interface for local and remote models.
summary: Open WebUI is a self-hosted AI interface for local and remote models with a familiar chat experience and an active open-source ecosystem.
whyItMatters: Open models need usable interfaces. Open WebUI gives teams and individual builders a practical way to run model workflows without starting from a blank app shell.
notFor: Teams that need a fully managed SaaS-only product
seoTitle: Open WebUI: Open-source self-hosted AI interface
seoDescription: A concise editorial profile of Open WebUI, including what it does, who it is best for, license, repo, and related open-source AI resources.
shareDescription: A self-hosted AI interface for local and remote models.
featuredReason: A practical interface layer for builders running local and open AI stacks.
